title: Nandhavana Theru
subTitle: Seenu, an orphan and a thief, forms a bond with a wrongly convicted man in the prison and decides to unite him with his niece. Little does he know his life is going to change forever.

title: To Be Announced
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Pillaiyar Theru Kadaisi Veedu
subTitle: Ganesan loves Sandhya but things take a turn when his cousin Valli wants to marry him. However, when he learns of Sandhya's terminal illness, he marries her and earns the wrath of his family.

title: Prasad
subTitle: Prasad, who is unable to speak and hear, overcomes various challenges to become a swimming champion. Though his father initially dislikes him due to his disability, his efforts change his heart.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.
Three men with distinct special needs unexpectedly fall for the same woman, sparking a unique and complicated love story filled with challenges and emotions.

title: Kudaikul Mazhai
subTitle: Parthiban-an auto rickshaw driver falls in love with a girl and she loves him too. But later Parthiban learns that the girl is a TV show anchor and was just faking about her love for him.

title: Enn Purusan Kuzhantai Mathuri
subTitle: A man gets involved with another woman just a day before he is to get married. After marriage, he lands in trouble when he confesses his mistake to his wife.

title: Kummi Paattu
subTitle: Consumed by extreme rage, a young man rapes his step-brother's fiancee. However, she decides to forgive him and supports him overcoming his troubles.

title: Gambeeram
subTitle: A fearless police officer crosses swords with a local politician, and in the fight, he loses his wife. Unabated and with more power, he rises again to take on ruthless politicians.

title: V.I.P
subTitle: A petty thief and an NRI executive trying to save a company mistakenly end up switching places. However, things become complicated when both fall for a woman around them.

title: Thozhan
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Agaya Gangai
subTitle: Murali moves into a house for rent which is owned by Sumathi's father. He falls in love with Sumathi and befriends Selvi, the housemaid's daughter, and faces a dilemma.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Makkal En Pakkam
subTitle: Childhood friends Samraj and Rajmohan become enemies after Samraj is falsely accused of theft. While Samraj, becomes a smuggler, he constantly faces problems due to Rajmohan's political influence.

title: Puthiya Sangamam
subTitle: After initial hiccups, Krishna and her collegemate Vijayan fall in love with each other. Later, Krishna learns that Vijayan only pretended to be in love to exact revenge.

title: Sengottai
subTitle: Thirumoorthy is a corrupt politician who plans to kill the prime minister as he lusts after his position. However, Sekhar, a young police officer, creates hurdles in his path.

title: Namma Annachi
subTitle: Annachi uses unscrupulous ways to help the villagers overcome their problems, while his son is stickler for rules and believes in abiding by the law. Contrasting views lead to a clash between the two.

title: Pichaikkaran
subTitle: A rich businessman's mother enters into a comatose state after an accident and the doctors are unable to cure her. However, a priest promises him that she would recover if he leads a beggar's life.

title: Mr. Romeo
subTitle: A man enjoys the luxuries of life as a celebrity in Bangalore. However, his life is upended when he stumbles upon a series of medical crimes and decides to expose the perpetrator.

title: Teleshopping

title: Idhu Enna Maayam
subTitle: Arun creates a match making app that involves his theatre skills.But when a rich man requests to set him up with Arun's ex-girlfriend, Arun has second thoughts about helping him.

title: Aanai
subTitle: A former policeman is hired as a bodyguard for a girl child after a series of kidnappings in the city. However, he is in for a rude shock when the girl gets kidnapped and killed.

title: Nallavanukku Nallavan
subTitle: Gangadharan, a kind man, hires Manickam, a reformed criminal, at his factory, who in time wins his trust and is put in charge of the business. However, Gangadharan's spoiled son is unhappy about it.

title: Thoranai
subTitle: A man manages to find his estranged brother, who had run away from home twenty years ago. However, his brother's miserable past life impedes him from starting afresh.

title: Veeram
subTitle: A fearless young man vows to mend his violent ways after falling in love with a beautiful maiden. However, he is forced to resort to violence after a gang of nefarious criminals pursue his lady love.

title: Winner
subTitle: Fed up with Sakthi's hooliganism, his parents send him to stay with his grandparents in their village. However, he gets into more trouble when the family of the girl he loves does not accept him.
